name: jcc-s18-research-lab
description: A deterministic research lab for Golden Spatula S18 lineup discovery, simulation, and in-game decision support.

scripts.test: node src/pipeline/mechanism-catalog.js && node public/shop-reachability.js && node public/signal-parser.js && node public/augment-advisor.js && node public/llm-lane.js && node public/decision-narrator.js && node public/matcher-core.js && node public/star-god-core.js && node src/star-god/state-model.js && node src/core/item-catalog.js && node src/core/event-model.js && node src/core/mechanic-profiles.js && node src/core/research-metrics.js && node src/sim/combat-engine.js
scripts.build:model: node src/core/model.js && node src/pipeline/search.js && node src/pipeline/teamsearch.js
scripts.build:discovery: node src/pipeline/discover.js && node src/pipeline/transition.js && node src/pipeline/numeric-lens.js && node src/pipeline/research-lab.js
scripts.build:matcher: node src/pipeline/stage2-matcher.js && node src/pipeline/route-certifier.js && node src/pipeline/forward-planning-lab.js && node src/pipeline/mechanism-overfit-lab.js && node src/pipeline/match-playability-lab.js
scripts.build:experiments: node src/experiments/jinx-sisters-lab.js && node src/experiments/mecha-branch.js && node src/experiments/mecha-prime-lab.js
scripts.build: node src/pipeline/mechanism-catalog.js && npm run build:model && npm run build:discovery && npm run build:experiments && node src/pipeline/meta-solver.js && node src/pipeline/stage2-matcher.js && node src/pipeline/route-certifier.js && npm run build:transition-experiment && npm run build:policy-compiler && npm run build:matcher && npm run build:virtual && npm run build:event-model && npm run audit
